title: rhamnus californica subsp. typica
intro: Rhamnus californica subsp. typica, also known as the California buckthorn or California coffeeberry, is a deciduous shrub native to the western coast of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues and its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rhamnus californica subsp. typica include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
